title: Infosys expands strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA for financial crime operations modernization
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expanded strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA, Norway's largest bank, to modernize DNB's Financial Crime operations using the NICE Actimize X-Sight Enterprise platform. Infosys will act as systems integration partner and lead enterprise architecture design, platform integration, and data migration. The engagement will consolidate customer and payment screening, customer due diligence, transaction monitoring, fraud monitoring, and enterprise case management onto a cloud-native SaaS platform. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to modernize DNB's Financial Crime operations using NICE Actimize X-Sight Enterprise platform.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations

key_facts.fact: Infosys will help DNB transform fragmented, legacy systems into a unified, intelligence-driven, cloud-native platform intended to enhance risk insights, improve detection accuracy, and strengthen multi-jurisdiction regulatory compliance.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations

key_facts.fact: Infosys will act as systems integration partner and, in collaboration with DNB, lead end-to-end modernization including enterprise architecture design, platform integration, and data migration.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations

key_facts.fact: The engagement will consolidate customer and payment screening, customer due diligence, transaction and fraud monitoring, and unified enterprise case management onto a single scalable SaaS platform.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations

key_facts.fact: Infosys will integrate X-Sight's anti-money laundering and fraud solutions to improve customer risk visibility and detection of complex and evolving financial crime patterns.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations
